title: A pilot reports 3 UFO sightings during flights between Brasília-DF and Curitiba-PR [1993]

text_preview:
JUNE 24th, 1993.

A commercial pilot on the aircraft prefix PT LSF reported three sightings, on three different days, from UFO during three flights from Brasília-DF to Curitiba-PR.

According to the pilot, the UFO varied in colors red, green, white and blue. Such lights and its high speed were the only characteristics that the pilot was able to describe from the unidentified flying object.

In the first sighting, the UFO remained above the aircraft of the reporting pilot, in the Northwest/West position, on the horizon, then below and then disappearing. Duration: 30 minutes. People on board: 4.
summary: A commercial pilot reported three separate UFO sightings on flights between Brasília and Curitiba in June 1993, with radar detection at varying speeds.
